response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:24: Identified performance of '迷宮なラビリンス'. Used visual OCR to identify the song title and confirmed the group 'Secret Society holoX' as the performers/original artists. 2. 00:24-04:57: Identified as an MC/talk segment with no vocal music. 3. Lyrics search: Searched for '迷宮なラビリンス 歌詞' and '"迷宮なラビリンス" 歌詞'. Confirmed it is an original song by holoX. Since official lyrics were not found online, provided a transcription of the main hook and noted that full lyrics are not publicly available.
response.global_summary: A video segment featuring a performance of the original song '迷宮なラビリンス' (Labyrinthine Labyrinth) by the VTuber group 'Secret Society holoX', followed by an extended MC/talk segment discussing their 4th anniversary and new membership perks.

scenes.description: The members of holoX perform the song '迷宮なラビリンス'. The screen displays the song title.
